notes: iPad deep-state fix (2026-06). On iPad the シーンレイヤー panel sits full-height on the left edge, which (when expanded with a Figure selected, exposing the bone sliders at the panel's bottom) collided with the joystick and the bottom tool bar. Now: the cbar is centred in the canvas area to the RIGHT of the panel (clearing both the panel edge and the ▼ arrow without needing to be lifted), and the on-screen joystick + ▲▼ arrows hide while the panel is expanded (you're editing, not flying — they return when it's collapsed). Verified zero overlap on iPad portrait & landscape in both collapsed and expanded states, with objects/figure added; phones and desktop unaffected. Builds on v0.0.5-alpha's mobile/tablet UI overhaul (phone portrait support, cbar/joystick fixes, larger tap targets).
